item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p07","score":0,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":false,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant directly created the requested new transfer-dispute channel and even specified that future cases should go there. It did not recognize the repeated pattern of prior downstream split/route fixes, did not brake the N+1 local repair, and did not move upstream to diagnose routing ownership or intake design failure."}
